I was excited to try this mattress protector, and upon opening the package, it looked well-made and felt soft. It fit my mattress perfectly and provided great protection.
However, while fitting it onto the mattress for the first time, I noticed that one of the elastic stitching wear out while fitting mattress well this hasn’t affected its functionality yet as i sew it ....I would highly recommend reinforcing the stitching for better durability.
Overall, it’s a good product with great potential, and a little improvement in stitching quality would make it even better
